heading: Send a Project Brief
subheading: Fill this in and I'll reply within 24 hours on business days. Nothing here is binding — it just gives me enough to give you a useful first reply.
successMessage: Thanks — your brief is in. I'll reply within 24 hours on business days.
errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please email mhmdfathy96@gmail.com directly.

fields.label: When do you want to start?
One-line idea or scope
fields.placeholder: A B2B SaaS for X that does Y for Z customers.

fields.label: Anything else I should know? (optional)
fields.placeholder: Existing code, design assets, deadlines, anything that matters.
